inviteCodeDesc: Share this code so family members can join.
joinError: That code wasn't found. Please check and try again.
noFamilyBody: Create a shared space so every family member commits to the same walls — and can show up for each other when it gets hard.
familyNameNote: Only members you invite will see this space.
proposeSuccess: Wall proposed — your family will see it.
waveringTitle: It's okay — this is why you practice.
waveringBody: Wavering is information, not failure. You're still in it.
waveringShareQ: Let your family know? They'll get a supportive message, not a judgment.
weeklyCheckIn: Did you hold your walls this week?
weeklyNote: This stays private unless you choose to share with your family.
createErrorMessage: Please try again. If the problem continues, contact support.
